LGTM once tests go green
/test images
Changes LGTM, but it looks like there may be some real test errors.
/test images
@mheon @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat now updated with image v3.0.1 and storage v1.13.0 along with the latest Buildah.
Alright, once this is green we should be good to make a release branch and do some reverts

Rerunning failed checks.

The release appears to have slipped again. Oops.
Does buildah need to get bumped to c/storage 1.13.0 and c/image 3.0.1 and then bump a new Buildah 1.10.1 to be merged here?

> Does buildah need to get bumped to c/storage 1.13.0 and c/image 3.0.1 and then bump a new Buildah 1.10.1 to be merged here?

We're good here as the libraries are already vendored with this PR.

Preparing slides for Flock at the moment, not sure if I can track that down today.

Now back to looking into it:

seeing `Error: cannot listen on the TCP port: listen tcp4 :5000: bind: address already in use`

> Now back to looking into it:
> 
> seeing `Error: cannot listen on the TCP port: listen tcp4 :5000: bind: address already in use`

Red herring. Had a moby container running.

/lgtm
/hold

Test `podman login and logout with multi registry` is failing very consistently.

Rootless tests are probably a separate issue.

```

[+0341s] • Failure [17.129 seconds]
[+0341s] Podman login and logout
[+0341s] /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/login_logout_test.go:20
[+0341s]   podman login and logout with multi registry [It]
[+0341s]   /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/login_logout_test.go:165
[+0341s] 
[+0341s]   Expected
[+0341s]       <int>: 0
[+0341s]   not to equal
[+0341s]       <int>: 0
```
Oh, missing one thing there - it's line 237. Very last expect.
I have no idea how this test works or does not work, and why this push is supposed to fail.

This has a hold, so
/lgtm
Replaced by https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3765
